scope: B8.1 class-balanced randomized-audit contract canary -- PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL (committed + hash-pinned BEFORE the run).
status: development-only | NOT confirmatory | NOT deployable | NOT validation (Lee2019 SM16 real-geometry emulator, not a real randomized audit) | NO tag
authorized: reviewer-authorized 2026-07-06 after B8.0 MIXED (controls mixed cov+prior 1/50 + refuses violations, but prior-only collider floor 5/50 + POS power 4/50 not separated from it)

targets.primary_1: reduce CONTRACT_NULL_prior_only B8_ALERT floor (B8.0 was 5/50=10%; the observed-Y collider)
targets.primary_3: test whether CONTRACT_POS_boundary power rises ABOVE the (now-lower) null floor

core_change.design_class: Dc = the real cued class y0 -- a PRE-ASSIGNMENT / pre-outcome design variable (NOT the observed/generated post-hoc Y)
core_change.randomization: C balanced-randomized WITHIN (subject x block x Dc) strata (class-balanced randomization)
core_change.exact_null: resample C* WITHIN (block, Dc) strata -- pre-assignment stratifier -> NO collider (the single causal change vs B8.0)
core_change.unchanged: B3 contrast T, studentized gate, estimability (n_exact_invalid <= 0.20*n_boot), min_confirm_pairs, feature cache -- BYTE-UNCHANGED from B8.0. No statistic change, no feature/montage change, no p-value retuning.

primary_hard: H2 schedule hash matches pin (integrity, full-cohort)
H3 executed C follows schedule (adherence C==C_table)
provenance_gate.secondary_diagnostic: D1 block-adjusted AUC(C~Z) <= tau=0.60 (fail-closed; reported for EVERY cohort)
provenance_gate.principle: provenance is PRIMARY; a QUIET confound (small schedule deviation, low AUC) is refused by H3 adherence even though D1 AUC passes -> closes the B8.0 stress-design gap. Contract-FIRST: invalid contract refuses BEFORE T is computed (so a genuine concept under an invalid contract is REFUSED, not alerted).
provenance_gate.honesty: H3 schedule-adherence is a PRE-REGISTRATION verification (executed==pinned schedule), NOT a claim to discover confounding from observational data (that is what B3->B7 failed at). The contract value is REQUIRING+VERIFYING a known randomization.
provenance_gate.gates_exercised_in_emulator: DESIGN-RED-TEAM (wtp17jn53): H1/H2/H5 are NON-DISCRIMINATIVE BY CONSTRUCTION here (H2 hash-integrity + H5 balance always pass; no world corrupts the table). The canary exercises only H3(adherence, the operative gate) + H4(support, fires on condition_lock) + D1(AUC, secondary). Interpret as an H3/H4 test, NOT a 5-gate validation. H3 is zero-tolerance (match<1 refuses); robustness to noisy/graded real-world adherence is out of scope. _schedule_hash pins per-(block,Dc) COUNTS not per-trial assignment (H3 is per-trial).
provenance_gate.second_order_residual: permuting C with Y held fixed breaks the C->Y prior main-effect link, so the null is exact only for the sharp interaction-null (h0 absorbs the main effect). prior_only safety leans on the studentized AND-gate; the merge reports mean-T-alone vs both-gate co-fire (section E).

seeds.disjointness: clear of B8.0 [400e6,411e6], B7 300e6, B6 200e6, R1/strong-cov 80-120e6, P3 50-70e6, B5 30/40e6; smoke used 771e6

substrate.dataset: Lee2019 / OpenBMI SM16 log-bandpower (real EEG geometry)
substrate.role: realistic Z/subject substrate; semi-synthetic injections; NOT validation

worlds.stress_cells: quiet_cov_no_concept + quiet_cov_plus_concept close the B8.0 stress-design gap (quiet confound that PASSES tau, +/- a real concept); success = REFUSE via provenance (H3), NOT alert

screen_preregistered.contract_valid_nulls: B8_ALERT <= 3/50 each; CONTRACT_NULL_prior_only is PRIMARY (was 5/50); CONTRACT_NULL_cov_plus_prior must STAY <= 3/50; CONTRACT_random_label <= 1/50 preferred
screen_preregistered.contract_valid_pos: CONTRACT_POS_boundary B8_ALERT > 0 (>=5/50 strong); CONTRACT_POS_boundary_plus_prior reported separately. POS expected weak on this substrate (studentized-gate property, B8.0 was 4/50) -- safe-but-weak/powerless is NOT a regression
screen_preregistered.contract_violating: CONTRACT_INVALID high AND B8_ALERT == 0 each (contract-FIRST GUARANTEES 0 violation alerts; ANY violation alert = provenance LEAK = hard-stop, NOT tolerated up to 3). For quiet_cov_plus_concept success = REFUSE (invalid contract), NOT alert-because-concept-exists

interpretation.prior_controlled_mixed_controlled_pos_st: direction strong; discuss budget frontier LATER (NOT authorized now)
interpretation.prior_controlled_mixed_controlled_pos_we: safe-but-weak; next step = audit-budget frontier (separate authorization)
interpretation.prior_still_high: class-balanced contract did NOT fix the collider; inspect design, do NOT retune p
interpretation.mixed_fails: direction unstable; STOP + diagnose contract construction
interpretation.violation_alert: provenance/validator bug; fix before any science claim

hard_stops: observed/generated Y used as a randomization stratum
contract-invalid world alerts before provenance refusal
state counts do not sum to n
the statistic or feature cache changes
